explanation: The property states that globally, if leak compensation is enabled (represented by 'bool_exp1') and the MinPEEP alarm is active (represented by 'bool_exp2'), then the leak compensation shall be active in the next state (represented by 'X bool_exp3'). This captures the conditional activation of leak compensation by the MinPEEP alarm when the feature is enabled.

The property states that globally (G), if leak compensation is enabled ('enableLeakCompensation') and the MinPEEP alarm is active ('MinPEEPAlarm'), then in the very next state (X), leak compensation shall be active ('leakCompensationActive'). This captures the requirement that the MinPEEP alarm activates leak compensation when it is enabled.

The property states that globally, if leak compensation is enabled and the MinPEEP alarm is active, then leak compensation shall be active. This captures the requirement that the activation of leak compensation is conditional on both the user enabling it and the presence of a MinPEEP alarm.

The property states that globally (G), if the leak compensation is enabled (bool_exp1) AND the MinPEEP alarm is active (bool_exp2), then the leak compensation must become active (bool_exp3). This directly translates the requirement that activation of leak compensation is triggered by the MinPEEP alarm, but only when the leak compensation feature itself is enabled.

The property states that globally, if leak compensation is enabled (bool_exp1) and the MinPEEP alarm is active (bool_exp2), then leak compensation will be active in the immediately following state (X bool_exp3). This captures the notion of leak compensation being 'activated by' the MinPEEP alarm when it's enabled, implying a causal effect in the next time step.

The property states that globally (G), whenever leak compensation is enabled (bool_exp1) AND a MinPEEP alarm is active (bool_exp2), then in the very next state (X), leak compensation will be active (bool_exp3). This captures the 'activation by' mechanism, ensuring that the compensation becomes active immediately after the specified conditions are met.

The property states that globally, whenever the MinPEEP alarm is active and the leak compensation feature is enabled, then the leak compensation must be active. This ensures that the leak compensation is activated only when both conditions are met.

The property states that globally (G), if the leak compensation is enabled (bool_exp1) AND the MinPEEP alarm is active (bool_exp2), then eventually (F) the leak compensation shall become active (bool_exp3). This captures the requirement that when leak compensation is enabled and triggered by the MinPEEP alarm, it will be activated.

The property states that globally, if leak compensation is enabled and the MinPEEP alarm is active, then leak compensation must also be active. This captures the requirement that the MinPEEP alarm activates leak compensation when the feature is enabled.

The property states that globally, if the leak compensation feature is enabled AND the MinPEEP alarm is active, then the leak compensation shall be active in the very next state. This captures the causal "activated by" relationship, where the alarm acts as the trigger for the activation.
